title: 5 Tips for Deploying AI Agents to Production
summary: Five production deployment practices for AI agents: streaming tool call events for UI responsiveness, layered authentication with API Gateway and IAM separation, type-safe contracted database access with tenant isolation, guardrails and cost budgets via lifecycle hooks and model routing, and observability via metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing.
